message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Add, Sub, and ReduceSum

54 property-based tests:
- add_sub_oracle: 30 tests covering identity, commutativity,
  associativity, inverse relationships, infinity/NaN handling
- reduce_sum_oracle: 24 tests covering axis reductions, multi-axis,
  full reductions, linearity, and special value propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
